explorationLog.title: How do health-related programs communicate accreditation requirements differently from other colleges?
explorationLog.details: Health programs (Nursing, Public Health, Exercise Science) often have specific accreditation-driven messaging requirements. A centralized marketing team needs to understand these constraints before designing workflows.

explorationLog.title: Clinical placement marketing — who owns this?
explorationLog.details: Clinical placements are a key recruiting differentiator for health programs. Currently, individual departments handle this messaging. Post-consolidation, does centralized marketing take this on, or does it stay local?

tasks.task: Document accreditation-specific messaging requirements for each health program

themeNotes:
Health theme is still in early exploration. Need to schedule first full team meeting.

Complexity factors:
- Accreditation requirements
- Clinical placement marketing
- Multiple distinct programs (Nursing, Public Health, Exercise Science, etc.)
- Strong existing college identity
